gaps.description: Forum Standaardisatie 'comply or explain' list — over 40 mandatory ICT standards for Dutch government
gaps.reason: Requires structured extraction from forum-standaardisatie.nl; mixed format (HTML + PDF per standard)

gaps.description: Baseline Informatiebeveiliging Politie (BIP) — police-specific security controls
gaps.reason: Restricted distribution; not publicly available in structured format

gaps.description: Suwinet security norms — social security data exchange requirements
gaps.reason: Available as PDF only; requires manual extraction

gaps.description: NORA (Nederlandse Overheid Referentie Architectuur) — Dutch government reference architecture principles
gaps.reason: Large scope; requires scoping decision on which NORA layers to include

tools.name: search_controls
tools.description: Full-text search across all controls in both Dutch and English

tools.name: get_control
tools.description: Retrieve a specific control by framework-prefixed ID

tools.name: list_controls
tools.description: List all controls for a given framework with optional category filter

tools.name: list_frameworks
tools.description: List all available frameworks with control counts

tools.name: get_framework
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific framework

tools.name: get_iso_mapping
tools.description: Find Dutch controls that map to a specific ISO 27001/27002 control

tools.name: compare_controls
tools.description: Compare controls between two frameworks side by side

tools.name: search_by_sector
tools.description: Find controls relevant to a specific sector (government, healthcare, finance)

tools.name: about
tools.description: Server metadata, stats, data sources, and disclaimer

tools.name: check_data_freshness
tools.description: Per-source data age report with staleness flags

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: Data provenance and licensing information for all sources
